requests.original_question: For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up time by treatment arm?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Type of follow-up given" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Minimum';

requests.original_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';

requests.original_question: Find phase 2 clinical trials for Urothelial cancer that compared immunotherapy to anti-VEGF therapy?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Control arm" = 'Placebo';

requests.original_question: Find trials for hepatocellular cancer that report median follow-up duration in months for both treatment and control arms?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

requests.original_question: Which phase 3 prostate cancer trials compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy plus anti-EGFR therapy?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Prostate';

requests.original_question: List Avelumab trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer with overall follow-up longer than 10.6 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 10.6;

requests.original_question: Find phase 3 urothelial cancer trials comparing immunotherapy to tyrosine kinase inhibitors?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

requests.original_question: Which phase 3 trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer compared immunotherapy to a vaccine, excluding trials with chemotherapy as the control arm?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

requests.original_question: Find trials for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer that use Tremelimumab in combination with other treatments?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';
